retrieved_result: What Was Socrates' Main Idea About Philosophy? World View Philosophy Q: What Was Socrates' Main Idea About Philosophy? A: Quick Answer Socrates believed that true knowledge had to be sought and not taught. To him, life was about internal examination and focus. He eschewed the idea of focusing on the material.
